description.overview: The Dalmatian is known worldwide for its unique spotted coat and association with firehouses.
description.temperament: Dalmatians are energetic, playful, and sensitive. They bond closely with family and need plenty of activity.
description.health: Prone to deafness (8% deaf in both ears), urinary stones, and skin allergies.
description.exercise: Very high energy. Need extensive daily exercise - running, hiking, or vigorous play.

best_for: Those with time for extensive exercise
verdict.summary: Energetic, athletic dogs with iconic spotted coats. Dalmatians need very active owners who can provide extensive daily exercise.
